name: scroll3d
description: Open-source AI 3D website builder for cinematic scroll-driven websites.
author: Siddhartha Abhimanyu

scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm -r --if-present build && corepack pnpm -r --if-present typecheck
scripts.test: corepack pnpm -r --if-present build && corepack pnpm -r --if-present test
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm -r --if-present build && corepack pnpm -r --if-present lint
